lines.english: By Guru's Grace, He blesses us with His Glance of Grace.
He is the Giver of all souls.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਲ ਥਲ ਮਹੀਅਲ ਸਭਿ ਤ੍ਰਿਪਤਾਣੇ ਸਾਧੂ ਚਰਨ ਪਖਾਲੀ ਜੀਉ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: jal thal maheeal sabh tripataane saadhoo charan pakhaalee jeeo |3|
lines.english: The beings in the water, on the land and in the sky are all satisfied; I wash the Feet of the Holy. ||3||
He is the Fulfiller of the desires of the mind.
Forever and ever, I am a sacrifice to Him.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਦਾਨੁ ਕੀਆ ਦੁਖ ਭੰਜਨਿ ਰਤੇ ਰੰਗਿ ਰਸਾਲੀ ਜੀਉ ॥੪॥੩੨॥੩੯॥
lines.translit: naanak daan keea dukh bhanjan rate rang rasaalee jeeo |4|32|39|
lines.english: O Nanak, the Destroyer of pain has given this Gift; I am imbued with the Love of the Delightful Lord. ||4||32||39||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੀਉ ਪਿੰਡੁ ਸਭੁ ਰਾਸਿ ਤੁਮਾਰੀ ਤੇਰਾ ਜੋਰੁ ਗੋਪਾਲਾ ਜੀਉ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: jeeo pindd sabh raas tumaaree teraa jor gopaalaa jeeo |1|
lines.english: Body and soul and all riches are Yours. Yours is the Power, O Lord of the World. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨੁ ਤਨੁ ਤੇਰਾ ਧਨੁ ਭੀ ਤੇਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: man tan teraa dhan bhee teraa |
lines.english: Mind and body are Yours; all wealth is Yours.
You are my God, my Lord and Master.
Maajh, Fifth Mehl:
I bow down and fall at Your Feet.
Forever and ever, You are the Giver of Peace.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਾਰ ਕਮਾਵਾ ਜੇ ਤੁਧੁ ਭਾਵਾ ਜਾ ਤੂੰ ਦੇਹਿ ਦਇਆਲਾ ਜੀਉ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: kaar kamaavaa je tudh bhaavaa jaa toon dehi deaalaa jeeo |2|
lines.english: I act as it pleases You, as You cause me to act, Kind and Compassionate Dear Lord. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰਭ ਤੁਮ ਤੇ ਲਹਣਾ ਤੂੰ ਮੇਰਾ ਗਹਣਾ ॥
lines.translit: prabh tum te lahanaa toon meraa gahanaa |
lines.english: O God, from You I receive; You are my decoration.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਤੂੰ ਦੇਹਿ ਸੋਈ ਸੁਖੁ ਸਹਣਾ ॥
lines.translit: jo toon dehi soee sukh sahanaa |
lines.english: Whatever You give me, brings me happiness.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਥੈ ਰਖਹਿ ਬੈਕੁੰਠੁ ਤਿਥਾਈ ਤੂੰ ਸਭਨਾ ਕੇ ਪ੍ਰਤਿਪਾਲਾ ਜੀਉ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: jithai rakheh baikuntth tithaaee toon sabhanaa ke pratipaalaa jeeo |3|
lines.english: Wherever You keep me, is heaven. You are the Cherisher of all. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਗਲ ਮਨੋਰਥ ਪੂਰਨ ਹੋਏ ਕਦੇ ਨ ਹੋਇ ਦੁਖਾਲਾ ਜੀਉ ॥੪॥੩੩॥੪੦॥
lines.translit: sagal manorath pooran hoe kade na hoe dukhaalaa jeeo |4|33|40|
lines.english: All my hopes and desires are fulfilled; I shall never again suffer sorrow. ||4||33||40||
Meditating, meditating in remembrance, Nanak has found peace.
Twenty-four hours a day, I sing Your Glorious Praises.
Maajh, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਲਿ ਥਲਿ ਮਹੀਅਲਿ ਦਹ ਦਿਸਿ ਵਰਸਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: jal thal maheeal deh dis varasaaeaa |
lines.english: Over the sea and over the land-over all the earth's surface, in all directions, He has brought the rain.
The Supreme Lord God has unleashed the rain clouds.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਂਤਿ ਭਈ ਬੁਝੀ ਸਭ ਤ੍ਰਿਸਨਾ ਅਨਦੁ ਭਇਆ ਸਭ ਠਾਈ ਜੀਉ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: saant bhee bujhee sabh trisanaa anad bheaa sabh tthaaee jeeo |1|
lines.english: Peace has come, and the thirst of all has been quenched; there is joy and ecstasy everywhere. ||1||
He gives and forgives all beings.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਪਨੇ ਕੀਤੇ ਨੋ ਆਪਿ ਪ੍ਰਤਿਪਾਲੇ ਪਇ ਪੈਰੀ ਤਿਸਹਿ ਮਨਾਈ ਜੀਉ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: apane keete no aap pratipaale pe pairee tiseh manaaee jeeo |2|
lines.english: He Himself nurtures and cherishes His Creation. I fall at His Feet and surrender to Him. ||2||
He is the Giver of Peace, the Destroyer of pain.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾ ਕੀ ਸਰਣਿ ਪਇਆ ਗਤਿ ਪਾਈਐ ॥
lines.translit: jaa kee saran peaa gat paaeeai |
lines.english: Seeking His Sanctuary, salvation is obtained.
With each and every breath, I meditate on the Lord's Name.
Yours is the Honor, God, and Yours is the Power.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਸੁ ਬਿਨੁ ਹੋਰੁ ਨ ਦੂਜਾ ਠਾਕੁਰੁ ਸਭ ਤਿਸੈ ਕੀਆ ਜਾਈ ਜੀਉ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: tis bin hor na doojaa tthaakur sabh tisai keea jaaee jeeo |3|
lines.english: Without Him, there is no other Lord and Master. All places belong to Him. ||3||
You are the True Lord and Master, the Ocean of Excellence.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕੁ ਦਾਸੁ ਕਹੈ ਬੇਨੰਤੀ ਆਠ ਪਹਰ ਤੁਧੁ ਧਿਆਈ ਜੀਉ ॥੪॥੩੪॥੪੧॥
lines.translit: naanak daas kahai benantee aatth pehar tudh dhiaaee jeeo |4|34|41|
lines.english: Servant Nanak utters this prayer: may I meditate on You twenty-four hours a day. ||4||34||41||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਹਜ ਸਮਾਧਿ ਲਗੀ ਲਿਵ ਅੰਤਰਿ ਸੋ ਰਸੁ ਸੋਈ ਜਾਣੈ ਜੀਉ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: sehaj samaadh lagee liv antar so ras soee jaanai jeeo |1|
lines.english: I am intuitively absorbed in the state of Samaadhi deep within. God alone knows this sweet pleasure. ||1||
All happiness comes, when God is pleased.
Maajh, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਪੂਰੇ ਕੇ ਚਰਣ ਮਨਿ ਵੁਠੇ ॥
lines.translit: gur poore ke charan man vutthe |
lines.english: The Feet of the Perfect Guru dwell in my mind.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਦਾ ਅਲਿਪਤੁ ਜੀਆ ਕਾ ਦਾਤਾ ਕੋ ਵਿਰਲਾ ਆਪੁ ਪਛਾਣੈ ਜੀਉ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: sadaa alipat jeea kaa daataa ko viralaa aap pachhaanai jeeo |2|
lines.english: He is always detached; He is the Giver of souls. How rare is that person who understands his own self. ||2||
My Lord and Master is Inaccessible and Unfathomable.
Deep within each and every heart, He dwells near and close at hand.
This is the sign of union with God:
in the mind, the Command of the True Lord is recognized.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਹਜਿ ਸੰਤੋਖਿ ਸਦਾ ਤ੍ਰਿਪਤਾਸੇ ਅਨਦੁ ਖਸਮ ਕੈ ਭਾਣੈ ਜੀਉ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: sehaj santokh sadaa tripataase anad khasam kai bhaanai jeeo |3|
lines.english: Intuitive peace and poise, contentment, enduring satisfaction and bliss come through the Pleasure of the Master's Will. ||3||
God, the Great Giver, has given me His Hand.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਦਾਸ ਕੀਏ ਪ੍ਰਭਿ ਅਪੁਨੇ ਹਰਿ ਕੀਰਤਨਿ ਰੰਗ ਮਾਣੇ ਜੀਉ ॥੪॥੩੫॥੪੨॥
lines.translit: naanak daas kee prabh apune har keeratan rang maane jeeo |4|35|42|
lines.english: O Nanak, those whom God has made His slaves, rejoice in the pleasure of singing the Kirtan of the Lord's Praises. ||4||35||42||
He has erased all the sickness of birth and death.
